expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: Google Sheets dashboard export coverage distinguishes supported formats, entry points, and output expectations
expectations.evidence: The outputs state that required Phase 5b artifacts are missing and therefore the case focus cannot be verified as explicitly covered: execution_notes.md: "Looked for Phase 5b artifacts in provided evidence: none present." and result.md: "we do not have any Phase 5b run artifacts ... to verify the checkpoint audit actually enforced this specific coverage focus."
